notes: The isolated release gate is intentionally coarse and exists only to catch catastrophic scheduling regressions.
Use scripts/report-effect-timing-trend.sh for stricter non-blocking mean and p95 reporting.
scripts/compare-effect-timings.sh exits 1 for true metric regressions and 2 for malformed or incomplete captures; the trend reporter propagates those hard failures.
Refresh the baseline when Swift toolchains, CI runners, or the probe workload change materially.
